packages.description: By creating the Scan Tool Project, your Use Case Selection was the following: "Target Platform: Enterprise IT, Target User: External, Layer (Client-Server Architecture): Backend and Project Distribution Target: External". This is the Use Case for your individual Scan Tool Project. We (The FOSS Team) apply Policies Rules based on your Use Case in order to make it easier for you identifying critical licenses based on your use case. Be aware: Only scan code, which fits to this Use Case. Don't change or delete the Project Tags. They are an essential for the Policy Concept.
